name: Mattress Bag Universal Size - up&up™
description:
Protect your mattress during storage, moving or shipping with the help of this Universal Mattress Protective Cover from up&up™. Made from heavy-duty material, this protective mattress cover offers protection against dust, dirt, moisture, and pests to ensure it stays damage free. The universal size makes it the right pick for different mattresses, from twin to king, regardless of their type or thickness, while the transparent design allows you to see the mattress from the outside without opening it or shuffling other furniture. Easy to slip on and off, it can also be folded for space-efficient storage when not in use.

up&up™: We believe making smart choices for the people, places, and pets in your life should be easy and affordable. And, having quality you can trust should be a given. That’s why you can count on our promise – caring for your everyday in every way.

Satisfaction guaranteed – Love it or your money back.
